# wordpress_application_passwords (Data Source)

Reads all application password metadata records for a WordPress user.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_id` (Number) WordPress user ID that owns the application passwords.

### Read-Only

- `application_passwords` (Attributes List) List of application passwords for the user. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--application_passwords))

<a id="nestedatt--application_passwords"></a>
### Nested Schema for `application_passwords`

Read-Only:

- `app_id` (String) Application-provided identifier for the password, if present.
- `created` (String) GMT timestamp of when the application password was created.
- `last_ip` (String) IP address from last use, or null if never used.
- `last_used` (String) GMT timestamp of last use, or null if never used.
- `name` (String) Human-readable name of the application password.
- `uuid` (String) Unique identifier of the application password.
